name: flow-06-subflow-06p-approval
description: SUBFLOW-06P: T112 ApprovalRequestStore → T113 AdminNotifier → T114 ApprovalResultHandler → T115 ActivationGate. Conditional update (not SETNX) for approval.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation: T114 conditional update WHERE status=PENDING (not SETNX), second APPROVE idempotent success
Retrieve access-control-before-content and group-join-idempotency patterns for SUBFLOW-06P
Break into: T112 (store approval request) + T113 (notify admin) + T114 (conditional update APPROVE|REJECT) + T115 (activation gate)
Generate approval-result-handler.service.ts (T114). Conditional update WHERE status=PENDING. Second APPROVE on ACTIVE = idempotent success.
Score against iron rules: conditional update (not SETNX), idempotent second approval
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
